creator: cristi@net.utcluj.ro
text:
Network Discovery (or NeDi) is an application which is very useful for discovering and monitoring large networks of inteligent devices, such as switches and routers. 

NeDi is run hourly to gather information from devices using either SNMP or CLI and stores all this information in a MySQL database. Later, you may search nodes my IP address, MAC etc. in a web interface.

You may either give NeDi a static list of devices, or it may do its discovery by using CDP.

Although NeDi is a relatively new project, it is in a rapid development.

Original website: http://nedi.sourceforge.net
